property.name: quoteLineId
property.label: Quote Line Id
property.description: The ID of the Quote Line to load pre-selected conditions from

property.name: productName
property.label: Product Name
property.description: The name of the product to display

property.name: preSelectedCodes
property.label: Pre-Selected Codes
property.description: Comma-separated list of codes to pre-select (alternative to Quote Line Id)

property.name: selectedCodes
property.label: Selected Codes
property.description: Comma-separated list of selected pricing condition codes

property.name: selectedCodesList
property.label: Selected Codes List
property.description: Array of selected pricing condition codes

property.name: numberOfRowsPerColumn
property.label: Rows Per Column
property.description: Number of checkboxes to display per column

property.name: descriptionMaxLength
property.label: Description Max Length
property.description: Maximum length for descriptions before truncation
